title: Advenium 3
body:
# ![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50bdaeb94dc885c79bcbb877c7ef2e22459315f7.png)

### You can do a lot of things! Such as wander around and find new places, fight monsters, go on adventures, make awesome machines or factories, or do cool builds.

⚠ Note: This modpack includes some mods that are only available on CurseForge. I apologize for any inconvenience. See the modpack page on CurseForge: [Modpack page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/advenium-3)

🚧 BETA NOTICE: This project is currently in **BETA**. Some mods or the modpack itself may contain bugs until the full release.

AQUACULTURE 2 MOD LINK: [Aquaculture 2 Link (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)

### Thanks for playing! Have fun!
